title: Segfault with syntax error
body:
```
❯ iverilog -v
Icarus Verilog version 11.0 (devel) (02ed16a)
```

From the following command
```
❯ iverilog -t null -W all test.sv
```


test.sv
```verilog
module d();
       nand n2(w1,

       nand n1(w2);
endmodule
```
